title: Mini Wallet
description: is a web-based application designed to simulate a digital payment ecosystem in a simple, secure, and responsive way. The app's primary focus is on providing a seamless user experience for managing balances and conducting daily financial transactions without the complexities of conventional banking.

title: Skybooking
description: SkyBooking is a web-based airline reservation platform designed to simplify the process of searching and booking flights. The project combines the high performance of React with the design flexibility of Tailwind CSS, creating an intuitive and responsive interface across multiple devices.
